semantic.role: End-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline with a mock LLM provider.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories with initialized Git repositories for test isolation.
Invokes the built CLI binary via child_process to simulate user interactions.
Verifies that CLI commands (scan, sync, etc.) produce correct output and exit codes.
Ensures the full pipeline (scanning, analysis, indexing) behaves correctly under controlled, mock conditions.
outOfScope: Unit-level testing of internal modules; this suite tests the integrated CLI binary end-to-end.
Testing with real LLM providers; LLM interactions are mocked or simulated.
invariants: Test files in the repository must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (architectural rule).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide deterministic, isolated E2E coverage of the CLI pipeline to catch regressions before release.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: refactor: remove legacy CLI aliases, rebuild docs, fix schema and tests — this test file was likely updated to match CLI changes.
